name:
title-AI that works
in
text:
AI that works
inside your control plane.
textPreview: AI that works | inside your control plane.

name: cover-sub
text: A governed route from operational signal to trusted action—for Europe’s most demanding enterprises.
textPreview: A governed route from operational signal to trusted action—for Europe’s most demanding enterprises.

text: Open with the outcome: European enterprises should be able to deploy ambitious AI without trading away operational control. Do not name BMW or Siemens as customers; use them as examples of the buyer profile only if asked.

name: title-Your most valuab
text:
Your most valuable decisions
still live between systems.
textPreview: Your most valuable decisions | still live between systems.

name: problem-copy
text: The issue is not whether AI can answer. It is whether AI can operate safely across the systems, languages, policies, and people that already run your business.
textPreview: The issue is not whether AI can answer. It is whether AI can operate safely across the systems, languages, policies, and people that alre...

name: problem-body-0
text: Calls, documents, messages, telemetry—context is fragmented.
textPreview: Calls, documents, messages, telemetry—context is fragmented.

name: problem-body-1
text: Teams translate evidence manually before they can act.
textPreview: Teams translate evidence manually before they can act.

name: problem-body-2
text: Security, legal, and operations need a proof trail—not a black box.
textPreview: Security, legal, and operations need a proof trail—not a black box.

name: problem-close
text: The cost of hesitation is operational drag. The cost of haste is ungoverned AI.
textPreview: The cost of hesitation is operational drag. The cost of haste is ungoverned AI.

alt: Technician inspecting industrial machinery with a tablet

text: This slide creates the tension. Move quickly: the enemy is not legacy technology, it is the gap between information, action, and accountable control.

name: title-Europe is settin
text:
Europe is setting a higher
standard for how AI is deployed.
textPreview: Europe is setting a higher | standard for how AI is deployed.

name: why-now-copy
text: The AI Act is risk-based. Data protection expects purpose, proportionality, safeguards, and clarity. Enterprise AI now needs a governance story as strong as its automation story.
textPreview: The AI Act is risk-based. Data protection expects purpose, proportionality, safeguards, and clarity. Enterprise AI now needs a governance...

name: why-body-0
text: Which model, data, policy, and owner shaped each outcome.
textPreview: Which model, data, policy, and owner shaped each outcome.

name: why-body-1
text: Set the region, access boundaries, retention, and action permissions.
textPreview: Set the region, access boundaries, retention, and action permissions.

name: why-body-2
text: Give operations, security, and legal an evidence trail they can examine.
textPreview: Give operations, security, and legal an evidence trail they can examine.

name: citation-Sources: E
text: Sources: European Commission — AI Act policy page, accessed 12 Jul 2026  •  Sources: European Commission — GDPR principles, accessed 12 Jul 2026
textPreview: Sources: European Commission — AI Act policy page, accessed 12 Jul 2026  •  Sources: European Commission — GDPR principles, accessed 12 J...

text: Use precise language: this is not legal advice and we do not claim automatic compliance. The buyer’s deployment must be governed appropriately to its use case and risk classification.

name: title-Sovereignty is a
text:
Sovereignty is a control plane,
not a marketing claim.
textPreview: Sovereignty is a control plane, | not a marketing claim.

name: sov-copy
text: For ClerkTree, sovereign AI means you decide where sensitive operations run, what systems can act, and how every decision can be explained.
textPreview: For ClerkTree, sovereign AI means you decide where sensitive operations run, what systems can act, and how every decision can be explained.

name: sov-body-0
text: Choose where data is processed and how it is retained.
textPreview: Choose where data is processed and how it is retained.

name: sov-body-1
text: Match the model, provider, and policy to the workload.
textPreview: Match the model, provider, and policy to the workload.

name: sov-body-2
text: Define what an agent may do—and when a human must approve.
textPreview: Define what an agent may do—and when a human must approve.

name: sov-body-3
text: Keep traceability for inputs, decisions, actions, and exceptions.
textPreview: Keep traceability for inputs, decisions, actions, and exceptions.

name: sov-foot
text: This is the platform posture we design toward with every enterprise deployment.
textPreview: This is the platform posture we design toward with every enterprise deployment.

name: citation-Sources: E
text: Sources: European Commission — AI Act policy page, accessed 12 Jul 2026
textPreview: Sources: European Commission — AI Act policy page, accessed 12 Jul 2026

text: This is an important expectation-setting slide. It makes sovereign AI concrete: controls, not slogans. In discovery we turn these controls into the customer’s own blueprint.

name: title-The first AI win
text:
The first AI win should be
operational, not theatrical.
textPreview: The first AI win should be | operational, not theatrical.

name: start-copy
text: Start with one high-volume workflow where speed matters, human judgement still matters, and a clean baseline makes the outcome undeniable.
textPreview: Start with one high-volume workflow where speed matters, human judgement still matters, and a clean baseline makes the outcome undeniable.

name: workflow-body-0
text: Triage service requests, surface urgency, route the right next action.
textPreview: Triage service requests, surface urgency, route the right next action.

name: workflow-body-1
text: Transform inbound signals into prioritised work and clearer handoffs.
textPreview: Transform inbound signals into prioritised work and clearer handoffs.

name: workflow-body-2
text: Extract evidence, classify cases, and move exceptions to experts faster.
textPreview: Extract evidence, classify cases, and move exceptions to experts faster.

name: start-foot
text: We do not sell a “platform rollout.” We earn the right to scale through a measured operational result.
textPreview: We do not sell a “platform rollout.” We earn the right to scale through a measured operational result.

alt: Quality engineer using AI-assisted manufacturing tooling

text: This is the reusable vertical slide. Keep the deck singular by using sectors and workflows—not customer logos or implied client endorsements.

name: title-One operational
text:
One operational layer turns
signals into decisions—and decisions into action.
textPreview: One operational layer turns | signals into decisions—and decisions into action.

name: product-copy
text: ClerkTree brings customer conversations, documents, and operational context into a monitored, action-ready workflow.
textPreview: ClerkTree brings customer conversations, documents, and operational context into a monitored, action-ready workflow.

name: product-bullet-1-body
text: Receive real-time signals from conversations and operational workflows.
textPreview: Receive real-time signals from conversations and operational workflows.

name: product-bullet-2-body
text: Extract structured context: intent, priority, sentiment, and follow-up needs.
textPreview: Extract structured context: intent, priority, sentiment, and follow-up needs.

name: product-bullet-3-body
text: Route work, trigger approved actions, and keep teams in control of exceptions.
textPreview: Route work, trigger approved actions, and keep teams in control of exceptions.

name: ai-layer-caption
text: SIGNALS  →  AI OPERATIONS LAYER  →  APPROVED ACTIONS
textPreview: SIGNALS  →  AI OPERATIONS LAYER  →  APPROVED ACTIONS

alt: AI operations layer between industrial signals and approved actions

text: Product proof comes after the buyer understands the job to be done. Emphasise that this is a monitored workflow, not an autonomous black box.

name: title-Human teams stay
text:
Human teams stay at the
decision boundary.
textPreview: Human teams stay at the | decision boundary.

name: decision-copy
text: The platform should accelerate routine work, not hide consequential judgement. ClerkTree turns interaction into a prepared decision—then applies the policy you define.
textPreview: The platform should accelerate routine work, not hide consequential judgement. ClerkTree turns interaction into a prepared decision—then ...

name: human-body-0
text: Extracts, classifies, and surfaces the relevant context.
textPreview: Extracts, classifies, and surfaces the relevant context.

name: human-body-1
text: Rules determine the permitted action and escalation path.
textPreview: Rules determine the permitted action and escalation path.

name: human-body-2
text: Teams resolve exceptions and retain accountability.
textPreview: Teams resolve exceptions and retain accountability.

name: rescue-caption
text: Example: a high-risk action is scheduled only with verified consent and clear risk context.
textPreview: Example: a high-risk action is scheduled only with verified consent and clear risk context.

text: This slide is especially useful for risk, legal, and works-council conversations. The point is that human oversight is a system design principle, not a manual fallback.

name: title-A 90-day pilot d
text:
A 90-day pilot designed to
prove value before scale.
textPreview: A 90-day pilot designed to | prove value before scale.

name: pilot-copy
text: One workflow. One accountable business owner. One shared scorecard. Every step is built to turn evidence into a go/no-go decision.
textPreview: One workflow. One accountable business owner. One shared scorecard. Every step is built to turn evidence into a go/no-go decision.

name: pilot-body-0
text: Map the workflow, risk controls, data boundary, and baseline.
textPreview: Map the workflow, risk controls, data boundary, and baseline.

name: pilot-body-1
text: Launch in shadow or supervised mode with named owners and escalation paths.
textPreview: Launch in shadow or supervised mode with named owners and escalation paths.

name: pilot-body-2
text: Measure the operating result, quality, adoption, and scale decision.
textPreview: Measure the operating result, quality, adoption, and scale decision.

name: pilot-callout-text
text: The destination is not a demo. It is an executive decision based on a real operational result.
textPreview: The destination is not a demo. It is an executive decision based on a real operational result.

alt: Industrial engineers reviewing maintenance action at a machine

text: This is the commercial spine. The pilot is intentionally bounded: a controlled proof, not an open-ended transformation programme.

name: title-Build control in
text:
Build control into
the deployment—not
the post-mortem.
textPreview: Build control into | the deployment—not | the post-mortem.

name: gov-copy
text: Before launch, agree the operating controls that turn good intentions into deployable governance. The exact configuration follows your use case, risk assessment, and legal requirements.
textPreview: Before launch, agree the operating controls that turn good intentions into deployable governance. The exact configuration follows your us...

name: control-b-0
text: Purpose, minimisation, retention, and sensitive-data handling.
textPreview: Purpose, minimisation, retention, and sensitive-data handling.

name: control-b-1
text: Identity, roles, approved actions, and escalation paths.
textPreview: Identity, roles, approved actions, and escalation paths.

name: control-b-2
text: Provider/model selection, monitoring, change control, and testing.
textPreview: Provider/model selection, monitoring, change control, and testing.

name: control-b-3
text: Logs, documentation, handover context, and reviewable exceptions.
textPreview: Logs, documentation, handover context, and reviewable exceptions.

name: gov-foot
text: Sovereign AI is a business design choice: the customer retains the authority to set the boundary.
textPreview: Sovereign AI is a business design choice: the customer retains the authority to set the boundary.

name: citation-Sources: E
text: Sources: European Commission — AI Act policy page, accessed 12 Jul 2026  •  Sources: European Commission — GDPR principles, accessed 12 Jul 2026
textPreview: Sources: European Commission — AI Act policy page, accessed 12 Jul 2026  •  Sources: European Commission — GDPR principles, accessed 12 J...

text: This slide makes the enterprise-ready conversation concrete without presenting a legal opinion. It is also a useful checklist for the initial security and data-protection workshop.

name: metrics-copy
text: A credible enterprise programme starts with the baseline and ends with a decision. We define the business case in operational terms your team already trusts.
textPreview: A credible enterprise programme starts with the baseline and ends with a decision. We define the business case in operational terms your ...

name: metrics-promise
text: No vanity metrics. No unsupported ROI promise.
textPreview: No vanity metrics. No unsupported ROI promise.

name: metric-b-0
text: How quickly the workflow reaches a usable next action.
textPreview: How quickly the workflow reaches a usable next action.

name: metric-b-1
text: Where process cost moves—measured against the agreed baseline.
textPreview: Where process cost moves—measured against the agreed baseline.

name: metric-b-2
text: Accuracy, exception rate, human acceptance, and rework.
textPreview: Accuracy, exception rate, human acceptance, and rework.

name: metric-b-3
text: Whether teams choose the workflow in day-to-day operations.
textPreview: Whether teams choose the workflow in day-to-day operations.

text: If the 40% processing-speed benchmark comes up, say it is an internal target for suitable workflows and that the pilot scorecard is what establishes the customer-specific result.

name:
title-One workflow.
On
text:
One workflow.
One owner.
One measurable win.
textPreview: One workflow. | One owner. | One measurable win.

name: entry-copy
text: This is how a European enterprise can move from AI interest to a governed operating result—without betting the business on a broad transformation programme.
textPreview: This is how a European enterprise can move from AI interest to a governed operating result—without betting the business on a broad transf...

name: entry-foot
text: A clean yes or no after 90 days.
textPreview: A clean yes or no after 90 days.

name: entry-body-0
text: Prioritise inbound requests, route context, and protect the human decision boundary.
textPreview: Prioritise inbound requests, route context, and protect the human decision boundary.

name: entry-body-1
text: Turn fragmented communications into ready-to-act operational handoffs.
textPreview: Turn fragmented communications into ready-to-act operational handoffs.

name: entry-body-2
text: Extract evidence, classify work, and accelerate the route to expert review.
textPreview: Extract evidence, classify work, and accelerate the route to expert review.

text: This is where a buyer can recognize their own entry point. Adapt the wording of the first row for a named account, but retain the one-workflow, one-owner, one-win structure.

name: title-Operational inte
text:
Operational intelligence
is only useful when it
stays connected to work.
textPreview: Operational intelligence | is only useful when it | stays connected to work.

name: graph-copy
text: ClerkTree is built to hold context across interactions, show why an action is recommended, and give operating teams a visible path from signal to execution.
textPreview: ClerkTree is built to hold context across interactions, show why an action is recommended, and give operating teams a visible path from s...

name: graph-metric-1-label
text: Information travels with the case—not in a separate queue.
textPreview: Information travels with the case—not in a separate queue.

name: graph-metric-2-label
text: Teams see the evidence, not only a generated answer.
textPreview: Teams see the evidence, not only a generated answer.

name: graph-metric-3-label
text: Approved playbooks turn insight into a governed next step.
textPreview: Approved playbooks turn insight into a governed next step.

name: graph-caption
text: Operational context rendered as a navigable customer graph.
textPreview: Operational context rendered as a navigable customer graph.

text: Use the screenshot as a product-character cue, not a feature checklist. The buyer should infer that this is an operational system with context and accountability.

name: title-One governed loo
text:
One governed loop—
from industrial signal
to trusted action.
textPreview: One governed loop— | from industrial signal | to trusted action.

name: loop-copy
text: The model is only one part of the system. Value appears when data, policies, people, and permitted actions work as one accountable operating loop.
textPreview: The model is only one part of the system. Value appears when data, policies, people, and permitted actions work as one accountable operat...

name: loop-bullet-1-body
text: Machines, documents, and conversations supply the operational context.
textPreview: Machines, documents, and conversations supply the operational context.

name: loop-bullet-2-body
text: AI prepares the decision within the controls you define.
textPreview: AI prepares the decision within the controls you define.

name: loop-bullet-3-body
text: Policy and people set the boundary for trusted action.
textPreview: Policy and people set the boundary for trusted action.

name: loop-caption
text: A visible loop makes automation auditable, bounded, and easier to scale.
textPreview: A visible loop makes automation auditable, bounded, and easier to scale.

alt: Governed industrial AI operating loop diagram

text: Use this visual to explain why the AI model is not the product by itself. The operational loop—signals, controls, human approval, and action—is what makes the programme enterprise-ready.

name: title-The robot does t
text:
The robot does the
repetitive work.
Your people keep the judgement.
textPreview: The robot does the | repetitive work. | Your people keep the judgement.

name: robot-copy
text: AI can recognise patterns and prepare the next step. It should only act where your policies, permissions, and people allow it to act.
textPreview: AI can recognise patterns and prepare the next step. It should only act where your policies, permissions, and people allow it to act.

name: robot-loop
text: SEE THE SIGNAL  •  PREPARE THE CASE  •  APPROVE THE ACTION
textPreview: SEE THE SIGNAL  •  PREPARE THE CASE  •  APPROVE THE ACTION

name: robot-foot
text: The point is not to remove expertise. It is to make expertise travel further.
textPreview: The point is not to remove expertise. It is to make expertise travel further.

alt: Human technician and robotic assistant in industrial oversight workflow

text: This is the visual expression of human oversight. It works particularly well when a buyer fears job displacement or uncontrolled autonomy: AI prepares; people and policy keep authority.

name: title-Supported by exp
text:
Supported by experience
from teams at
textPreview: Supported by experience | from teams at

name: supporters-copy
text: We bring practical operating experience from companies that have set a high bar for data, product, and customer operations.
textPreview: We bring practical operating experience from companies that have set a high bar for data, product, and customer operations.

name: supporters-foot
text: A shared belief: intelligent systems should make operations more capable, visible, and accountable.
textPreview: A shared belief: intelligent systems should make operations more capable, visible, and accountable.

name: title-The future of Eu
text:
The future of European AI
is not less ambitious.
It is more accountable.
textPreview: The future of European AI | is not less ambitious. | It is more accountable.

name: close-sub
text: Let’s identify the first workflow where greater speed, stronger control, and a measurable operating result can all be true at once.
textPreview: Let’s identify the first workflow where greater speed, stronger control, and a measurable operating result can all be true at once.

name: close-details
text: Outcome: use-case selection  •  control blueprint  •  90-day pilot business case
textPreview: Outcome: use-case selection  •  control blueprint  •  90-day pilot business case

text: Close with a concrete next step. The design workshop is the requested meeting, not an abstract invitation to discuss AI.
